title: Dataset of personal invoices and receipts including annotation of relevant fields
author: Cruz, Francisco
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a dataset comprising 190 images of invoices and receipts that belong to one of the authors. It also includes text files with the transcription of relevant fields for each document – seller name, seller address, seller tax identification, buyer tax identification, invoice date, invoice total amount, invoice tax amount, and document reference.
steps_raw: This is a dataset comprising 190 images of invoices and receipts that belong to one of the authors. It also includes text files with the transcription of relevant fields for each document – seller name, seller address, seller tax identification, buyer tax identification, invoice date, invoice total amount, invoice tax amount, and document reference.
